title: SPILLING THE TEA: assumptions about college | university of rhode island
body:
You don't look like a circus clown by ANY MEANS... but I can totally relate to the no makeup for weeks thing lol. I just started putting on makeup again for videos and it feels SO weird.
I love this video idea! I feel like a lot of these assumptions would apply to other colleges too because I know I thought some of the same things would be true before I started college!

title: Campus Life: Intro (2011) - Trailer [ by University of Rhode Island Film Collaborative ]
body: Sigh, I graduated four years ago from URI. I just finished my MBA (part-time) from URI this year as well. Watching this video makes me miss the campus so much. I also met my wife there! We actually took a ride down to Narragansett Beach today with our dogs and reminisced about the good ol' days at URI. By far the best four years of my life! College is so much more than classes and partying. Enjoy every second of it, because it goes by too fast.
author: @kylem6286
